failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: CfvyoA
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T19:38:07.155518+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Community clinic walk-in hours and eligibility.", "model": "BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed

1. Test Case ID: CfvyoA
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T19:38:07.155518+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Community clinic walk-in hours and eligibility.", "model": "BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed

`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T19:38:07.155518+00:00"}`

1. Test Case ID: FO8Y2V
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed-batch'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T19:38:07.665199+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"texts": ["First document to embed", "Second document to embed", "Third document to embed"], "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '404 Not Found' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed-batch'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/404","timestamp":"2026-04-12T19:38:08.229584+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text1": "Tenant organizing workshop next Tuesday.", "text2": "RSVP for the housing rights clinic.", "model": null}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/similarity

1. Test Case ID: RcfYxm
- Server error
[502] Bad Gateway:
`{"error":"Reindex service request failed: [Errno -2] Name or service not known","timestamp":"2026-04-12T19:38:33.795777+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/scrape/reindex?verbose=false&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: RcfYxm
